name: Linguine with Clam Water Cress Sauce
recipeIngredient: 10 ounces (or 1 can, 6 ounces) canned mince clams or tuna in water
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat butter and olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add garlic and sauté for 3 to 5 minutes or until tender.
3. Stir in white wine and cook for 2 minutes over high heat.
4. Mix in chopped parsley, watercress, and green onions; cook over medium heat for 2 to 3 minutes.
5. Drain the clams (or tuna) but reserve the liquid.
6. Add the fish mixture to the garlic sauce and heat through.
7. Meanwhile, cook linguine in a large pot of boiling water until just tender. Drain well and add to skillet with the clam or tuna mixture; toss.
8. If the mixture is dry, add 2 to 3 tablespoons reserved liquid.
9. Season to taste with salt and pepper, then sprinkle with the remaining chopped parsley.
10. Toss and serve immediately.
